hero.heading: Book a free trial class.
hero.body: Fill in the form and we'll be in touch within 24 hours to confirm your child's free trial. No payment, no commitment.

form.heading: Book a free trial or send an enquiry
form.successBody: We'll confirm your free trial class by email within 24 hours. Bring curiosity — we'll handle the rest.
form.disclaimer: We respond within 24 hours, Monday to Friday.

faqs.question: Is the first trial class really free?
faqs.answer: Yes, completely. Your child attends one full class at no cost. No credit card required to book.

faqs.question: How quickly will you respond?
faqs.answer: Within 24 hours on weekdays. If you send a form on Friday evening, expect a response Monday morning.

faqs.question: Can I visit the centre before committing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Reach out to schedule a tour — you can watch a class in progress and meet the coaches.

faqs.question: What if my child doesn't like it?
faqs.answer: That's what the free trial is for. If they're not keen after the first session, you walk away with no obligation. We'd rather have students who want to be here.
